infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: QuoteMySmile uses your location to find dentists nearby. We never track in the background and never sell your location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAccuracyAuthorizationDescripti: Precise location is used to match you with the closest dentists.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: QuoteMySmile uses your camera to capture guided photos of your teeth for accurate quotes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: QuoteMySmile uses your microphone only when you choose to record a short video clip of your teeth instead of a photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Save your dental quotes and consult details to your photo library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: QuoteMySmile uses your location to find dentists nearby. We never track in the background and never sell location data.

plugins.cameraPermission: QuoteMySmile uses your camera to capture guided photos of your teeth for accurate quotes.
plugins.microphonePermission: QuoteMySmile uses your microphone only when you choose to record a short video clip instead of a photo.
